assertions.expectation: Categorizes notifications by type: auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/deprecation, security patch
assertions.reason: Response clearly categorizes all required notification types in the matrix table and decision tree, including auto-upgrade scheduled, new version available, end-of-life/EoS warnings, and security patches

assertions.expectation: Assigns urgency levels to each category (security patches = highest, new version available = lowest)
assertions.reason: Response assigns proper urgency levels with security patches as 'High' priority, end-of-life as 'Critical', auto-upgrade as 'Medium', and new version available as 'Low'

assertions.expectation: End-of-life warnings require action: plan upgrade before the support window closes
assertions.reason: Response explicitly marks EoS warnings as 'Critical' with 'Mandatory' action required and provides specific commands and timelines (30-60 days) for immediate planning

assertions.expectation: Auto-upgrade scheduled notifications should trigger pre-upgrade checklist execution
assertions.reason: Response provides detailed checklist for auto-upgrade notifications including checking timing conflicts, verifying maintenance windows, and applying exclusions if needed

assertions.expectation: Security patch notifications may require expedited upgrades outside normal maintenance windows
assertions.reason: Response specifies security patches need deployment within 7-14 days and mentions 'consider accelerated patches for critical CVEs', indicating expedited handling

assertions.expectation: New version available notifications are informational — use for planning, not immediate action
assertions.reason: Response categorizes new version available as 'Low' priority, 'Informational' with 'No deadline' and states 'No immediate action required' with use for roadmap updates

assertions.expectation: Recommends setting up Pub/Sub or Cloud Monitoring alerts for GKE upgrade events
assertions.reason: Response provides specific commands for setting up Cloud Monitoring notification channels and alerting policies, plus Cloud Logging filters for different notification types

assertions.expectation: Mentions GKE release notes as the source for understanding what changed in each version
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GKE release notes as a source for understanding version changes - focuses on notification handling but lacks this specific reference
